title: Syncpen: A Markdown writing app your AI can write in (Claude, Cursor, Cowork)
abstract: Tired of struggling with Markdown? Syncpen is here to help! Powered by Claude, Cursor, and Cowork AI, this markdown writing app lets you fly through your text editing tasks with ease. Imagine your documents optimized automatically, and your creativity unleashed—don't wait, give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你还在为写Markdown头疼吗？Syncpen来帮忙啦！Claude、Cursor和Cowork三大AI写作神器，助你在文本编辑的世界里自由翱翔。想象一下，你的文档自动优化，创意无限放大，还不赶紧试试？
